mechanism: FX depreciation impairs dollar-denominated balance sheets, triggering credit tightening and capital outflows, which cause further depreciation, completing the sovereign doom loop. Egypt's ERPT escalated from ~0.20 to >0.50 through this mechanism.
regime_dependence: Activated in economies with >30% FX-denominated liabilities and Guidotti-Greenspan ratios above 0.6-0.8x; broken by adequate reserves and swap line access
